column1: Children________________playing since the first humans walked on the Earth thousands of year ago. (ENJOY)
Playing___________to be an important way for children to learn how to work together. (SEEM)
It also helps____________find out how the world works. (THEY)
Indeed, many scientists think that one of the__________ways for children to learn foreign language, for example, is to learn while playing games. (GOOD)
Children play games and play with toys, but what__________the differences between games a toys? (BE)
Firstly, toys______________rules or winners and losers. (NOT HAVE)
Secondly, a toy is always a physical thing that someone_________________ . (MAKE)
Some games, like Monopoly or football,___________physical equipment but others, like word games, do not. (NEED)
